basis: radial 2D crown FEA (gear_fea_radial.py) is the self-similar headline bound; single-station 2D (gear_fea.py) independently confirms k^3; 3D (gear_fea_3d.py) is NOT self-similar (hardcoded DISK_T=4.0 + absolute gmsh mesh sizes) so it cannot read the power law and is excluded from the scaling headline.

1.0.binding: gear (crown tooth root-bending) at every scale; current-limit is the protection

1.5.binding: gear (crown tooth root-bending) at every scale; current-limit is the protection

2.0.binding: gear (crown tooth root-bending) at every scale; current-limit is the protection
